scene_title: Espada sendo entregue a figura militar

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide symmetric frame of a medieval greatsword being passed by two black-gloved hands to a silhouetted figure in contemporary military uniform
subject.focal_point: the sword itself crossing between the parties
subject.secondary: The modern silhouette is faceless; background shows silhouetted nuclear silo infrastructure

lighting.fill_light: cold blue fill on modern figure

mood.emotion: the great sword delivered to present age

symbolism.primary: machaira megale now held by modern rulers
symbolism.secondary: transfer of divine weapon to human doctrine

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
